release.action:
Features

  • Initial Machai CLI release, including core commands and configuration support.
  • Act workflow: run Acts from built-in and custom act directories, with TOML-based act templates, inheritance, placeholders, defaults, and improved error handling.
  • AI/GenAI provider integrations and tooling: OpenAI provider improvements (timeouts, BadRequest recovery, logging, token/tool limit fixes), plus provider stubs (Claude/Gemini) and CodeMie integration updates.
  • Function tools framework: ServiceLoader-based discovery, REST and web-page fetch tools (incl. basic auth and text-only extraction), command execution tooling, and process termination support.
  • Project layout and scanning improvements: better rootDir/scanDir handling, Maven/Gradle/JS layouts, deterministic processing, module traversal, and denylist-based command security checks.
  • Assembly and packaging: assembly command and descriptors, delivery pack/zip creation, and Maven plugin goals and defaults.
  • Bindex capabilities: schema, repositories and function tools, generation/search improvements, layering and scoring, and builders for multiple project types.

Fixes

  • Improved robustness for act processing (template parsing, defaults, inherit placeholders, missing config handling) and scanning behavior.
  • Security and vulnerability fixes, including Grype-reported CVEs (GHSA-j288-q9x7-2f5v / CVE-2025-48924 and GHSA-2f88-5hg8-9x2x / CVE-2021-26291).
  • Multiple CLI/plugin fixes across options, logging, packaging, and provider request handling (e.g., follow-up requests, timeouts, and token refresh).

Refactoring

  • Refined Act prompt flow and normalized tool output/newlines; improved shared module processing in file processors.
  • Provider and tooling refactors (e.g., OpenAI client handling and adapter extraction) to simplify integration points.

Documentation

  • Expanded CLI, plugin, and Act documentation with practical examples; updated site content, navigation, icons, and manifests.
  • Improved Javadoc guidance and generated documentation structure across modules.

Chores

  • Version and dependency updates leading to the 1.0.0 release; packaging and build configuration cleanups.

Features

  • Added conf command and persistent configuration support (save/load system properties).
  • Added AeProvider and bundled AE recipes into the distribution/JAR; moved recipes into genai-client resources.
  • Improved guidance-driven file processing (process files based on @guidance tags) and added --dir/--root options (plus --clean) to the processing workflow.
  • Added URL registration parameter support to Picker.

Fixes

  • Improved compatibility with OpenAI-compatible providers; fixed prompts/model settings for CodeMie + gpt-4o-2024-08-06.
  • Fixed path/property issues (e.g., <ae.dir>/<aeDir>) and adjusted plugin execution safety (set threadSafe=false; fixed parent project processing).
  • Resolved template/guidance formatting issues (removed extra tags; fixed --- handling) and corrected file path usage in markdown reviewing.

Refactoring

  • Package and naming cleanups (e.g., BIndex -> Bindex) and general import/output message polish.
  • Embedding logic improvements to better support non-OpenAPI services.

Documentation

  • Updated README and site docs; refreshed AE recipes documentation and generated docs via gw process.
  • Added/updated package-info.java across packages for improved API documentation.
  • Renamed docs command to process and updated documentation accordingly.

Chores

  • Routine documentation regeneration and repository maintenance commits (gw process updates).

Features

  • Updated CLI commands.
  • Adjusted act/assembly command behavior.

Fixes

  • Fixed configuration property names (including GenAI model property) and updated documentation accordingly.
  • Fixed AssemblyCommand input logging (setInputsLog).
  • Corrected project folder naming/structure.

Chores

  • Updated bindex.json files.
  • Removed unused Maven-related dependencies.

Documentation

  • Updated README and general documentation.

Features

  • Improved act command prompt input handling.

Fixes

  • Fixed guidance tag definition and PlantUML Maven plugin configuration.
  • Fixed CLI/config property constant usage in commands (GWCommand, ActCommand).
  • Fixed CLI property loading and missing config handling (with tests).
  • Fixed Machai CLI GenAI manager references.

Refactoring

  • Removed system properties file loading.
  • Removed assembly command and bindex assembly support.
  • Removed gw.guidance from gw goal.

Documentation

  • Updated documentation and Javadoc (including overview formatting guidance).

Chores

  • Updated CLI commands/tests and addressed Sonar issues.
  • Updated bindex.json files.
